title: AI Piloting Spacecraft Without Human Control
description: AI is now piloting spacecraft autonomously, overcoming space delays. Explore how NASA and others use AI for navigation, safety, and deep space missions.

title: AI Impact: 73,000+ Tech Workers Fired By 95 Companies In Just 4 Months Of 2026
description: In early 2026, 95 tech firms including Amazon and Meta cut over 73000 jobs, AI driven automation and cost cutting fuel layoffs, experts warn of major white collar job losses

title: NEA AI Regulations Shield 440 Nuclear Reactors from Cyber Threats
description: OECD NEA deploys AI regulations to secure 440 nuclear reactors worldwide. Pilots target SCADA vulnerabilities using 99% precise anomaly detection and federated learning.

title: X removes 7 popular tech and AI accounts from Revenue Sharing over alleged undisclosed job promotions
description: X just booted seven prominent tech and AI accounts from its Revenue Sharing program for allegedly running undisclosed paid promotions. This decision came almost immediately after a thread exposed what looked like a coordinated ring of accounts dropping artificial hype replies under a job post. A user going by @CodingNoobie quietly posted a simple screenshot [...] The post X removes 7 popular tech and AI accounts from Revenue Sharing over alleged undisclosed job promotions appeared first on PiunikaWeb .

title: Ola’s Krutrim quietly shuts down its agentic AI assistant ‘Kruti’
description: Ola-owned Krutrim has quietly shut down its AI assistant Kruti within a year of launch, pulling it from web and app stores. The move raises concerns over its AI strategy, stalled LLM plans, and recent layoffs. The post Ola’s Krutrim quietly shuts down its agentic AI assistant ‘Kruti’ appeared first on MEDIANAMA .
